data.name: StaticConfigurationPropertyMultipleSettingsException_PropertyHasAlreadyBeenSet
data.value: The static configuration property '{0}' can only be set once.

data.name: TextEditor_SetFontVariantsOnlySupportsNormalSuperscriptSubscript
data.value: Only Normal, Superscript, and Subscript are supported. The current value is {0}.

data.name: TextEditorPlatformProvider_ReentrantEnsureLayoutUpdated
data.value: Immediate layout was triggered while layout was already in progress, which may cause unbounded recursion and a stack overflow.
